calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Setting For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for setting for prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:27:29 a.m. and concluding at 09:45:51 a.m.

Plaintiff Jiangsu Yunduan Energy Conservation and Emissions Reduction Technology Co., LTD represented by Stephen Shumlas, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Virus Geek Inc. not appearing.

RICHARD REED is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court examines Counsel regarding contract, proof of service on the complaint, and outstanding amounts owed by Defendant.

Court finds the following:

1. There is no contract between the 2 parties
2. Proof of Service on Summons and Complaint filed Sep-07-2022

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

RICHARD REED is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
COURT FINDS THE FOLLOWING:

1. The operative pleading is the Complaint, it is true and correct, and filed Aug-23-2022.
2. Complaint was served Aug-30-2022. Proof of Service filed Sep-07-2022
3. Default entered as to Defendant Virus Geek, Inc. Feb-09-2023
4. DOES 1-50 DISMISSED Feb-09-2023

Declaration of Richard Reed in Lieu of Testimony filed Feb-09-2023 is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

Based on, declaration of Richard Reed, in addition to his testimony and 2 invoices, the Court finds Plaintiff has proven essential elements in the complaint. Defendant is in breach of agreement to pay freight costs.

Plaintiff's request for interest is DENIED. There is no evidence of interest as part of this agreement.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Jiangsu Yunduan Energy Conservation and Emissions Reduction Technology Co., LTD, and against Defendant Virus Geek Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $70,144.90
2. Costs: $503.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $70,648.40

Proposed judgment signed as modified.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Continued To Jun-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
